title: Swan SK14611WHT Windsor Rapid Boil Kettle with Removable Limescale Filter, Boil Dry Protection and Hidden Cord Storage, 1.7L, 3KW, White
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: RAPID BOIL TECHNOLOGY: This cordless kettle comes packed with 3KW of power, which rapidly boils water for one cup in under 45 seconds. You’ll be ready to start the day in no time
LARGE 1.7 LITRE CAPACITY: Entertaining family and friends? Then the large 1.7 litre capacity of this electric kettle can make up to 7 cups of tea, coffee, or hot chocolate on a single boil
USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: The 360-degree rotating base has been designed with accessibility in mind, so whether you’re left or right handed you can easily pick the kettle up to pour and refill
CONVENIENT WATER LEVEL WINDOW: Remove the guesswork from knowing when the kettle needs to be refilled and easily monitor water levels thanks to the convenient window next to the handle
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: This Swan Windsor cordless kettle comes with a 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee with an additional year when you register the product
description: From the brand Previous page About Us With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understand that the kitchen is the heart of home life. It’s where delicious meals are made and memories are created. Swan’s passion is to make dream on-trend kitchens a reality for our customers, by offering affordable iconic cookware and appliance collections that boast stylish design and outstanding performance. specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti Scale Mesh Filter, Automatic Shut-Off, Boil Dry Protection, Overheat Protection, Water Level Indicator
